hero.question: Will Minnesota Vikings win the 2027 NFL NFC Championship?
hero.prob_take: At 7.6%, the market has essentially written off Minnesota's chances of a Super Bowl run, implying the Vikings need to be a top-2 seed in the NFC and execute perfectly in January. The Vikings won't be a perennial contender without a franchise QB, and the current roster construction screams "fringe playoff team," making this price actually fair even if Justin Jefferson stays healthy.

daily_take.headline: Vikings NFC Title Bet Just Got Cheaper. Smart Money Disagrees.
daily_take.deck: Minnesota's odds dropped 100 basis points overnight to 7.6%, but the market's overreacting to noise. The Vikings added Justin Jefferson back to an already dangerous offense, have a defensive core intact, and play in the weakest NFC division. At 7.6%, you're getting 12-to-1 odds on a team that should be 10-to-1 at worst. The dip is a gift.
